title: 10 health benefits of Teucrium canadense (wood sage)
intro: Teucrium canadense has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce the risk of chronic diseases like cancer, and protect against oxidative stress. Its antimicrobial and antiviral properties can aid in treating respiratory infections, while its astringent qualities can soothe digestive issues. This plant's medicinal benefits can improve lives by reducing pain and discomfort, boosting immunity, and promoting overall well-being.
